headerTitle: Manager, Software Engineering  ·  Commerce  ·  E-Commerce Platform
intro: My engineering leadership has always been player-coach in practice: I set technical direction, ship code alongside the team, and connect delivery to business outcomes. Having built and scaled multi-tenant SaaS products solo and with contractors, I've learned to run lean, prioritize ruthlessly, and still maintain quality at pace.
bullets: Technical Leadership in Practice — Led architecture and delivery across multiple concurrent SaaS products — defined the roadmap, made the stack decisions, handled cross-system dependencies, and kept shipping velocity high without accumulating debt that kills teams.

E-Commerce Adjacent Systems — Built payment integrations (Stripe), subscription billing flows, inventory-aware admin tooling, and multi-tenant data isolation — the building blocks that underpin any modern commerce platform.

Team Building and Mentorship — Directed offshore and contract engineers across time zones, set code review standards, and built the kind of documentation and tooling culture that keeps teams from depending on any single person — including me.
matchNotes: EM role with e-commerce context — strong leadership and delivery fit; direct commerce platform exp is adjacent
